factors.data_availability: medium — brain tissue is available through autopsy programs (CHTN, NDRI, ROSMAP) but not through standard commercial biobanks
factors.org_discoverability: medium — CHTN and NDRI are well-indexed in PubMed; Stibion and BIOMEDICA CRO less so
factors.biomarker_specificity: medium — Braak staging requires neuropathology expertise and is a hard filter, not a standard indexed field

expected_failure_modes: Pipeline finds ADNI/ROSMAP/ACT (data cohorts with data access) rather than autopsy tissue banks — these are valid but incomplete for tissue-level queries
Braak staging assumed from autopsy program context without explicit documentation — hard gate violation
Neuropathological confirmation treated as guaranteed for any dementia brain bank — requires per-case verification
CSF availability inferred from tissue program without explicit confirmation — CSF is a separate collection workflow at autopsy
Pipeline may not distinguish frozen tissue from FFPE — different pre-analytical implications for RNA-seq vs IHC
May not find commercial biobanks (Stibion, BIOMEDICA CRO) through PubMed — they publish less than academic autopsy programs
